description: Composition Red shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid-arm buttoned tabs, full length buttoned placket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron The classic appeal of natural fabrics combined with vintage cuts is back with a vengeance. Wear this shirt from mother earth with washed denims and chappals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 18”
